rationale: X's comment about deriving denoiser/component discovery from existing per-pipeline data (_dit_modules) instead of a fourth hardcoded list echoes the spirit of dsocek's actual ground-truth concern about generalizing the naming-conflict fix via _packed_modules_mapping, and X also raises a concrete, file/line-grounded gap (text-encoder LoRA still silently no-ops) with an actionable suggestion (warn on zero-match adapters). Y is a thorough but purely confirmatory validation pass — accurate and well-grounded, but it raises zero design concerns or suggested changes, missing the one substantive point a real reviewer made and offering nothing actionable.
